creator: jbozza@geocomm.com
text:
Location of icu patch is incorrect:
=> Attempting to fetch http://people.freebsd.org/~crees/postgresql-icu/pg-8419-icu-2014-02-10.diff.gz
fetch: http://people.freebsd.org/~crees/postgresql-icu/pg-8419-icu-2014-02-10.diff.gz: Not Found

Fix: 

PATCH_SITES+=   http://people.freebsd.org/~crees/postgresql-icu/:icu
should be:
PATCH_SITES+=   http://people.freebsd.org/~girgen/postgresql-icu/:icu
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build port configured with icu.
